transcript.text:
I had too much to drink last night
Greasy food is the best hangover cure
Hello everyone
I'm here at Suwon today
[Suwon, Hwasung]
I stopped by to grab a quick meal
I've been craving Donkatsu (pork cutlet)
And this restaurant caught my attention
Ta-da
[Yaetnal Donkatsu] [Suwon, Paldal-gu]
They only sell 70 pieces a day
But just 58 today
Hello~
Excuse me
Do you have some donkatsu left?
17 of them

Why do you only sell 70?
Because we age our meat
So just udon and donkatsu available, right?
I'll order 3 Udon and 3 Donkatsu, please
-Can you eat it all? -Yes
Yes I can
Should I order more?
She eats it by herself?
[I don't believe it]
Thank you
The bowl is big
Looks yummy
It's old traditional udon
Bon appetit
I came here for the donkatsu
But I need some soup right now

That's tasty
The noodles are very soft
It's really soft and gelatinous
This eases my stomach
The noodles are really soft
Thank you
She gave me coke too
This is a perfect spoon
Their noodles are different for sure It's very soft
Fried tofu
I've been wanting to eat some donkatsu For days
Original donkatsu Not too thin
The meat is very tender and tasty
Their sauce is different too
What is this though? I know this flavor
It's like.. garlic bread?

It's good The sauce is unique
Shrimp tempura
Delicious
Noodles
They give you a lot of noodles
Let's eat this as a whole
The meat is very tender and not tough to chew at all Maybe because it's aged
Last bite
I'm eating it so fast because it's so tender
Switch
Their noodles are not the same
How is it so soft?
I enjoy thick udon noodles, but I like these too
It comes with mugwort, but I asked not to put that in
The noodles keep sliding out
A great hangover cure

Switch this too
Just cut it in half
I remember this taste
This is...
Try this and let me know
There's something that's very familiar
Mushroom
Mushroom?
Are you sure?
It does taste like mushroom soup
It tastes good
It's something I know but I can't remember
What's the main ingredient for the sauce?
Butter and milk
-How about mushroom? -No mushrooms
Mr. PD...

-How about garlic? -Not at all
We're both very wrong
Now it's pretty obvious
Strong butter taste
Oh, that's why I said garlic bread earlier
I can taste little bit of herbs in here
Let's get it right this time
Are you doing a YouTube mukbang?
Yes
And you're eating all of that?
Yes, normally
Some people don't like these
But I like soggy tempura that's been in the soup
There's also donkatsu nabe
These fried foods are really good in sauce/soup
Greasy food is the best hangover cure

Pizza, hamburgers, fried foods, etc
The meat is very tender
Last bowl of udon
Mix it up well
Cut it in half again
1/4th for you!
These are big portions
These soaked in the soup will be tasty too
The noodles are still very fresh
It's really unique
It's not like those flour noodles They're very jelly-like
So they're not getting bloated
There's not much left
I don't know why I've been so hooked on these lately
I've had lots of different donkatsu before
The original ones are the best

They really do give you a lot of noodles
I really enjoy eating donkatsu
So I go on a hunt to find good spots
I have yet to find one that blew my mind
Let me know if you know a spot!
Hosanna one was really good
Although they don't specialize in donkatsu, it was really delicious
Finish it off with shrimp tempura
Did you really eat everything?
I couldn't eat too much today because I had too much to drink last night
But you still ate all of that
I was very hungover today because I had too much to drink last night
I feel much better now thanks to udon and donkatsu
Thanks everyone~
Now I have to go get a real meal, right? [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
